text.fullText: I am a single truck and trailer owner operator. Currently the freight market is deplorable. Brokers are not willing to disclose the amount that they are paid for the loads. It is very hard to make a living on the amount brokers are paying for loads.  Brokers should be made to show the paper trail for any load. I don't have a problem letting the broker keep a percentage for a load. It would be nice to see how much the brokers the brokers are being paid compared to how much they pay the carrier.
